title: MfgServiceConsoleSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings to access the Service Console for Manufacturing.

enableMfgServiceConsole.description: Indicates whether Service Console for Manufacturing is enabled in your org (true) or not false). Note: By default, Service Console for Manufacturing is disabled.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a MfgServiceConsoleSettings component.
